trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: add D1-backed integration coverage for auth edge states (disabled/reset-required/session expiry) and align auth routes with the Node integration harness.
scope: Add integration tests for /api/auth/login + /api/auth/me + /api/auth/logout covering active, disabled, reset-required, invalid login, and expired sessions; implement reset-required handling in the login route; update progress logs and the requirements catalog with the new evidence.
changes: Added tests/auth-login.integration.test.mjs to execute auth login/me/logout behavior against a deterministic D1 mock, covering active login, invalid credentials, disabled accounts, reset-required accounts (user status and credential flag), expired sessions, and logout revocation.

Updated functions/api/auth/login.ts to treat pending-reset and requires-reset credentials as password_reset_required, and updated auth route imports to use explicit .ts specifiers so Node can import route handlers during integration tests.
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md, docs/automation-memory.md, docs/progress/rebuild.md, and docs/progress/run-log.md to record the new MVP-004/MVP-005 evidence.
known_limits: Password reset endpoints and admin/user account lifecycle flows are still incomplete; this run only adds edge-state coverage and minimal login handling for reset-required accounts.
next_actions: Implement password reset endpoints (request, confirm, and enforce reset) plus credential rotation and session invalidation rules.
Add account disable/reactivate flows and tests, including revoking active sessions when an account is disabled.
